mapper.select: SELECT gm.id, gm.group_id, gm.from_id, gm.content, gm.msg_type, gm.voice_url, gm.create_time, u.nickname AS from_nickname, u.avatar AS from_avatar FROM group_message gm LEFT JOIN user u ON gm.from_id = u.id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY gm.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_message (group_id, from_id, content, msg_type, voice_url) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{fromId}, #{content}, #{msgType}, #{voiceUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT gm.id, gm.group_id, gm.from_id, gm.content, gm.msg_type, gm.voice_url, gm.create_time, u.nickname AS from_nickname, u.avatar AS from_avatar FROM group_message gm LEFT JOIN user u ON gm.from_id = u.id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY gm.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
